about_item: Comfortable Travel Solution: The Kurgo Loft Wander Dog Bed offers a cozy travel adventure mat with a durable top, ideal for RVs, hotels, or campsites during every outing
Made for the Outdoors: Built with microtomic ripstop material and a waterproof dog bed bottom to handle wet dogs and rugged terrain while staying clean and dry
Packable & Convenient: Features a quick roll design and convenient handle for effortless transport plus a hidden zipper pocket for stashing treats or small essentials
Designed for Real-World Adventures: Kurgo gear is built to solve everyday challenges with dogs, making travel, walks, and outdoor play safer, easier, and more fun for both of you
Durable Gear, Lifetime Promise: Engineered for longevity and reliability, every Kurgo product is crafted with rugged materials and backed by our industry-leading lifetime warranty

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed easy to carry and appreciate its portability, with one mentioning it's great for taking to the park. The bed is easy to clean, with customers noting it can be hosed down and dries quickly. Customers praise its quality, cushioning, and size, being large enough for labradors, and appreciate its water resistance and roll-up feature. While some customers find it durable, others report durability issues.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bed highly portable, making it easy to carry and travel with, with one customer noting that the straps make it convenient for storage and transport.

examples.snippet: Good dog travel pad. Wouldn’t call it a bed as it doesn’t have any bed-like structure to it. It’s just a padded flat mat.
Perfect portable pet bed- great for camping!!!
My niece’s dog took to this dog bed immediately! Perfect for camping, but uses for other traveling purposes, too.
It's exactly what I ordered. Helps big time when traveling with pet's . Easy to clean and roll up smaller to fit in our bags.

insights.title: Ease of cleaning
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bed easy to clean, as it can be hosed down and dries completely each day.

Makes traveling easy. Super easy to clean and can honestly use it for yourself to sit on as it has cushion.

authors_reviews.title: Worth the Money
authors_reviews.text: I ordered this dog bed for camping and another knockoff for my two 75-90 lb dogs to try. This one is far superior in quality and comfort. One of my dogs has hip issues and gets sore after a full day of outdoor activity - she far preferred this bed over any other surface. It had good padding over rocky ground. It was easy to clean and rollup when we packed up camp. Definitely not a bed to take backpacking, but it’s great for car/RV camping. If you want your fur baby to be comfortable, spend the extra $ and get a quality dog bed. I will be ordering a second so both of my dogs can be spoiled!
authors_reviews.author: Cassafrass

authors_reviews.title: Perfect portable pet bed- great for camping!!!
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size and amazing loft. Super comfy for our dog (and yes us too a few times) , easy to clean, really durable. The water proof bottom is perfect for use camping- we bought it to take camping for her, it packs up , not exactly small so car camping only- but rolls up super easy. It’s been great to toss on the ground, bottom protects from damp and the comfy top has enough loft to cushion her- important since she’s an older tripaw. We’ve taken it to visit friends and she knows exactly where to go lay down. Top is easy to wipe clean. I really can’t say enough about this - well constructed, durable, comfy, easy to clean and my pup loves it ! Buy it now your furry friend will thank you and you’ll be a rockstar pet parent.
authors_reviews.author: L.C.B.

authors_reviews.title: Comfy and compact!
authors_reviews.text: So far, I really like this bed for my two Great Danes! I haven't used it for the reason I purchased it yet (camping), so I hopefully it will continue to be an awesome dog bed when I do camp with them.I am currently using it in my SUV along with another bed (which I'm replaing with another one of these BTW). It has a decent amount of cushion which is surprising for a travel bed. The other travel dog beds I have seen have either been too thin or just not big enough for my two Danes. The grip in the car is great. I haven't noticed any sliding around except when the other dog bed I have in there pushes it. Nice grippy bottom.I love that I can just throw it in the wash without having to take off any layers. The material is that of a sleeping bag too, which is what I was going for since it would be for camping purposes. Easy to clean and moisture wicking.Both of my dogs seem to find it comfy! It is better than my last camping experience where we brought out our regular dog beds. Since we camped further away from our car, we had to lug them over there and since with live it Washington, it stays somewhat damp depending on where you are at, so I was afraid of it being too cold. We also couldn't bring them in our tent after we had them outside because the fabric wasn't easy to clean. I think that this new dog bed is going to solve all these issues!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon customer

authors_reviews.title: Great water resistant mat - easy to clean & lightweight for traveling
authors_reviews.text: I purchased two different dog mats and this was clearly the better of the two. I used it both in my camper as well as on the ground outside while camping. It truly is water resistant and the dirt/mud easily shakes off or can be cleaned with a damp rag. The padding is minimal but it’s a nice barrier between the ground and my puppy. I’ve also started training her to “place” on this as I will be using it for traveling on airplanes and trains while in Europe. She is not at chewer so I can’t speak to how chew resistant it is but it’s durable yet still easy to roll up for transport. The dog is a 49 pound Australian Shepherd and she curls up nicely on this.
authors_reviews.author: Candace Vernold

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality Travel Bed - and It Has a Pocket!
authors_reviews.text: Our local trivia spot is dog-friendly. Excited to use it there, and for getaways. My dog liked it immediately; the photo is of her lying on it after unboxing. She hates pictures, so please don’t let her expression deter you (i did not ask her to lie down and then snap this).The bed feels good quality and rolls up easily. It has a pocket! that easily holds a large-sized chew with room to spare. My dog goes through beds quickly - it’s difficult to find one with solid-quality material. The padding material and fabric quality of this bed exceed expectations. I look forward to having this for years to come.The model pictured, Vera, is a medium-sized pit 65lbs.I will update this review as time goes on if there are any significant deficiencies.
authors_reviews.author: Elizabeth

authors_reviews.title: Great travel bed for your pet
authors_reviews.text: I'll be honest, my dog uses it, but only in short bursts. There's not enough padding in it for his spoiled self, but he likes it better than a bare floor or dirt ground, so its an asset even if its not as fluffy as he likes.I love that its compact once rolled up. The straps make it easy to carry/store/travel with. Its waterproof and super easy to clean. Also has a pocket to store some small toys for the puppers. Great item to have on any trip with your dog.If it wasn't for the padding, I'd rate it 5 stars.
authors_reviews.author: Wandering Wolf

authors_reviews.title: BE AWARE the red is A Plasticity Windbreaker texture
authors_reviews.text: Be sure and read about the fabric on the red chili where your pet lays , I have the brown with a nice soft blanket style material, The Chili red is a stiff wind breaker “ plastic texture which Feels and looks cheap IAm Hoping the brown is still available or soon to be available.
authors_reviews.author: Jake

authors_reviews.title: Favorite bit of dog equipment!
authors_reviews.text: This is probably my favorite piece of dog equipment! I originally bought it to go through the airport with. I've trained her to settle on it in almost any circumstance, and it acts as a little safe space for her. I have taken it through 8 flights over the last two years, and bring it to random places for her to practice settling on, including the dog park and restaurants. We also have used this for obedience class. The roll up feature makes this convenient to transport.The other awesome thing is that there is a lifetime warranty! Plus a repair/replace option! We had one of the straps tear after two years hard use and they replaced it for free. If you tear your bed and it doesn't fall under the warranty, you can send it in and they will fix it/replace it for a nominal fee.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Our cairn terrier loved this camping dog mat
other_countries_reviews.text: I bought this mat for our cairn terrier. This was her first time camping and I wanted her to be as comfortable as possible. We first laid this out at home hoping she'll get used to it before camp. NOPE. She didn't want anything to do with it.But, she seemed to know this mat was for her when it was time to sleep in the tent (first night). She took to it right away. This also became her car comfy bed during our multi-day long drives from Nova Scotia Canada to Upstate NY. It rained several times, she tracked water onto the mat, but it seems to have quick drying properties because the water also dried up very quickly.We highly recommend this product. Our girl actually chose to sit on this mat rather than sit on the wet grass / gravel.
other_countries_reviews.author: O-

other_countries_reviews.title: Bonita
other_countries_reviews.text: Es bonita , un poco delgada , la pongo sobre un colchón que compre para que sea más cómoda, solo la uso en casa.

other_countries_reviews.title: Maravillosa de cama para todo los lugares
other_countries_reviews.text: La cama Kurgo es simplemente increíble para mi peludo. Su diseño cómodo y resistente garantiza un descanso óptimo, mientras que la calidad del material demuestra durabilidad. ¡Una elección maravillosa para mimar a tu peludo amigo! 🐾😊
other_countries_reviews.author: Ruben

other_countries_reviews.title: Lit pour chien
other_countries_reviews.text: Lit de transport très pratique et confortable pour notre chien! Il l’adore
